source.instructions: Use the accepted sculpt-v13 champion as the parent.

tool.instructions: Generate a bounded symmetric pair on one geometry axis.

axisReason: two reversed rounds selected screen-left rather than a consistent physical direction
cheek_definition was the next shared baseline diagnosis after jaw_taper
the larger configured cheek step tests whether disagreement is caused by imperceptibly small changes

audit.instructions: Round 1 blind ballot. Read-only; do not edit. Read Runs/face-search-20260720-032234/round-1/audit-package.json, then use view_image original detail on its target and every front/three-quarter/profile path. Do not inspect recipes, manifests, scripts, parameters, directions, primary package, or any other run data. Compare the approved target directly with each front. Front likeness is reference-backed; three-quarter and profile are anatomy-regression checks only. Ignore lighting, skin, hair, eyebrows, texture, and presentation: they cannot improve rank. Judge skull/facial silhouette, feature placement/projection, age structure, asymmetry, anatomical continuity, grounded mature geometry, and individual character. Reject projection tricks, implausible anatomy, cartoon/toy geometry, missing evidence, and generic smoothing that removes character. Return only the evaluator-contract JSON ballot. No candidate IDs, parameter inference, prose, markdown, promotion language, or extra fields.
audit.response: {"schemaVersion":1,"evaluatorId":"audit","winnerSlot":"left","confidence":0.58,"dimensions":{"frontLikeness":"better","threeDimensionalPlausibility":"better","groundedMatureGeometry":"better","individualCharacter":"better"},"hardFailures":[],"severeRegressions":[],"diagnosis":["All candidates remain too tall and narrow through the cranial and facial mass, leaving the target's compact broad mature silhouette unresolved.","The lower face still tapers too strongly into a generic oval chin rather than carrying the target's stable jaw width."],"nextAxis":"head_width"}
